Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: ✅Laifug dog bed exclusive design - double pillow SMART design.
✅Smart design：(I)high 4inch pillow & 2. 5inch pillow to pet head & neck to provide maximum comfort & support& security.

✅Orthopedic Memory Foam: (I)30d super soft foam+40d memory foam. Provide maximum comfort & support. Won't flatten. The famous Laifug foam will retain at least 90% of its shape & support for the next 3 years.

✅Cover design & waterproof liner：(I) custom fabric： 100% microfiber cover(210g). (II) water resistant & tear resistant cover. (Removable cover is machine washable. Soft to the touch. (Ilia) simple to spot clean & remove hair. Tumble dry on Gentle setting.
✅Extra Large bed - 50”L x 36”w x 10”h Dimensions for dogs 200 pounds and under. Laifug foam bed will become your pets favorite sleeping spot.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, with the right size for large breeds like Huskies and Great Danes, and appreciate its comfort for elderly pets. The bed features a firm cushion and is easy to wash and vacuum. While many customers say it will last a long time, some report issues with the cover tearing at the seams. Customers consider it well worth the price.

authors_reviews.title: Absolutely Amazing Dog Bed — High Quality, Supportive, and My Dog LOVES It!
authors_reviews.text: I rarely write long reviews, but this dog bed truly deserves it. I recently bought this Laifug memory foam dog bed for my Dalmatian, and it has exceeded my expectations in every possible way. From the moment I unboxed it, I could tell this bed was made with quality and comfort in mind.First impression:The bed is thick, dense, and feels incredibly durable. The memory foam is a single solid slab—not cheap shredded foam—so it actually provides real support. You can feel the firmness when you press down, but it still has enough softness to make it comfortable for long naps. My dog immediately walked over, sniffed it, made a few turns, and plopped down like she had been waiting for this bed her whole life.Comfort & support:My dog is very active, and sometimes she jumps and plays in her playpen. This bed holds its shape beautifully. Even when she stands on it, runs on it, or digs at it before laying down, the foam doesn’t sink or flatten. After she sleeps on it for hours, it still bounces back and stays supportive. I can see a noticeable difference in how relaxed she looks when resting on this bed compared to her old ones.Size & fit:The size is perfect for medium to large dogs. My Dalmatian can stretch out fully without hanging off the edges, which she absolutely enjoys. The bed fills the playpen space nicely and gives her a clean, comfortable place to rest, play with toys, or just watch the room.Cover & cleaning:This is one of the best parts — the cover is easy to zip off and machine wash. No weird bolsters or stuffing to pull out. The waterproof inner liner is a lifesaver, especially for dogs who drool, spill water, or have occasional accidents. I can wipe the liner clean and toss the outer cover in the wash without worrying about damaging the foam.Durability:After seeing her jump, scratch, and roll around on it, I’m genuinely impressed by how well the bed holds up. The stitching is strong, the zipper is high quality, and the fabric is tough but still soft and pleasant to the touch. Based on the build quality, I can already tell this bed is going to last a long time.My dog’s reaction:She LOVES it. As soon as she’s in her playpen, she chooses this bed over anything else. She even brings her toys onto the bed and relaxes there instead of on her fluffy blanket. Seeing her so comfortable makes this purchase 100% worth it.Overall:This is honestly one of the best dog beds I’ve ever bought. Supportive memory foam, smart design, washable cover, waterproof liner, great size, and excellent comfort. You truly get what you pay for. If you want a bed that will last, keep its shape, and keep your dog comfortable every single day, this is the one.Highly, highly recommended. I wish I had bought it sooner! 🐶❤️
authors_reviews.author: sally

authors_reviews.title: soft dog bed. easy to clean
authors_reviews.text: This dog bed is very comfortable and well-made. It provides great support and doesn’t flatten out over time, which is perfect for daily use. The material feels durable, and the removable, washable cover makes it easy to keep clean.It also looks nice and fits well with the rest of the room. Most importantly, my dog loves it and uses it all the time. Overall, it’s a great mix of comfort, quality, and convenience—definitely worth it.
authors_reviews.author: Richard Peterson

authors_reviews.title: Good quality!
authors_reviews.text: Super comfortable and great quality dog bed! The memory foam provides excellent support, especially for dogs with joint issues. My dog settled in right away and now chooses this bed over the couch. The cover is soft, durable, and easy to remove for washing. It holds its shape well and doesn’t flatten like cheaper beds. Definitely worth the purchase!
authors_reviews.author: Claire

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable and Well-Made Dog Bed
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been using this bed for a little while and my dog seems to really like it. The memory foam feels supportive, and the pillow edge is a nice touch for him to rest his head. The size is great and gives him plenty of room to stretch out.The cover is easy to remove and wash, which is very convenient, and the waterproof liner is a nice bonus. Overall, it feels well made and comfortable, and I’m happy with the purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Xin

authors_reviews.title: Seems decent
authors_reviews.text: Too soon to give a full review as we literally just put it together after the 48 hour raising. Seems to support out 100# mastiff without squishing down. Seems supportive, we laid on it too. Covers a little loose, but she likes to dig so prob a good thing
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Super soft bed
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves this bed! Very supportive and comfortable, and the size is perfect. Great quality for the price.
authors_reviews.author: Jackie

authors_reviews.title: Great Bed for my Big Babies
authors_reviews.text: I love this bed!! We have two English Mastiffs. It can be difficult to find a bed that is both comfortable and large enough for them. I bought one bed to see how it would do. I have since bought two more. It offers a lot of support and is well made. I love that the bolsters are made onto the mattress. That way all you have to do is remove and wash the cover. I also love that it has an additional waterproof cover as well. My only complaint is the top cover is somewhat stretched, which can put stress on the seams. The seam has slightly come apart in one spot on two of the beds. Because of this, I purchased another waterproof fitted sheet to cover the beds for extra protection. I have been very pleased with the beds so far and definitely find it worth the price.
authors_reviews.author: Renee Edwards

authors_reviews.title: Starboy Loves His New Bed and So Do We
authors_reviews.text: We put the bed together, with its waterproof liner and nice, soft bed cover. It's an easier job if you have two people, but wouldn't be a strain for just one person to get it right. We got the bed situated in its corner of our living room and when Starboy came into the living room we pointed and said, "Go get in your bed."Without hesitation, he got into his new bed.The bed is extremely nice. It is the 46" x 28" x 8" (Large) size. The microfiber cover is super soft, much like a soft fleece."Starboy" is our 62 lbs Border collie/McNab and we wanted a bed where he'd be able to stretch out completely when he felt the need. It looks like this bed is a bit large for him, but it fits in "his" corner perfectly and is exactly how we pictured it would be.The attached photo shows how Starboy got into his bed and then went to get his favorite toy ("Stumpy," the hide-a-squirrel tree stump). Once he had Stumpy, he settled in for a snooze.The price was right for this bed. We did my online research and this is the brand that came up first when we searched "best dog bed." A few months ago we looked and looked at various types of dog beds. We never saw the Laifug bed at all. So happy we waited and got our dog the right bed.MAJOR CONSIDERATIONS: The bed having a washable cover and --- more important --- getting a bed with materials certified to be free from harmful chemicals.
authors_reviews.author: @your6

other_countries_reviews.title: Cumplió al 100% mis respectivas
other_countries_reviews.text: Producto de alta calidad y mucho mejor que como se ve en las fotografías, volvería a comprarlo, un excelente precio en relación a la calidad
other_countries_reviews.author: RBautista

other_countries_reviews.title: Il Materasso con il.messimo comfort
other_countries_reviews.text: Il materassi e' esattamente come descritto as e' arrivato anche in anticipo. Il mio cane e' molto rilassato e felice! Adore il materasso! Ho ordinato XL per il mio cane che pesa 25 chill perche volevo che avesse molto spazio. E':contentissimo!.
other_countries_reviews.author: Annar Thawer

other_countries_reviews.title: Quite impressed!
other_countries_reviews.text: Wicked dog bed! Way bigger than expected, it fits his giant 136 lb body comfortably with room to sprawl. The foam is super thick, comfortable too (I tested). The support is a huge upgrade from his old bed; we were starting to notice him struggling to get up, but after just a few naps on this one, he’s already moving way easier. It actually seems to be helping his hips, which is such a relief.We’ve only had it a few days, so can’t speak to long-term durability yet, but first impressions are seriously solid.
other_countries_reviews.author: Emily

other_countries_reviews.title: Dogs love it - need to buy another!
other_countries_reviews.text: Our 13.5 year old lab LOVES this bed. She's riddled with arthritis and previously had a 3 inch egg-crate memory foam mattress. This is worlds apart and feels like a human mattress. It'a very dense foam which doesn't collapse. The water resistant cover is much thicker than I thought and the outer cover is a nice peachskin finish. Unfortunately it didn't match our decor, so with winter coming I bought a single sized 'teddy fleece' fitted sheet (also from Amazon) which fits the higher end perfectly, and is the correct width. I just folded the excess length under at the wall end. Makes for easy washing every week and it can be changed for a cooler version in the summer. I also bought two standard size sheepskin rugs which fit perfectly on top and have made it incredibly luxurious - by human standards, never mind dog standards! I only set it up a few minutes ago and she's asleep and snoring already. The two other labs are very interested in it but currently respecting the OAPs space. If she moved over there would be plenty of room for at least one more, all three would squeeze on at a push. I think I'll need to buy a second one for the other room! I don't really have space without moving a few things around, but it's such a lovely bed I think it's worth doing. I almost bought a very similar bed on here which was more that twice the price. Glad I decided to try this one first! Can't recommend it enough.
other_countries_reviews.author: Hayley

other_countries_reviews.title: La bendi fue muy feliz desde el primer minuto que estreno su cama
other_countries_reviews.text: la cama viene en un paquete muy pequeño y aplastada pero esperas unos minutos y la cama toma su forma... en general el producto viene como hace referencia la descripción, a mi perro le gusto bastante y espero que ya no se suba a la cama ... ya les cuento... aun no la lavo pero se me hizo super practica la funda para poder poner en la lavadora
other_countries_reviews.author: alberto
